tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kent State Golden Flashes vs. Oklahoma Sooners: Full Highlights) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: Hawkins Jr., No. 5 OU's stellar defense steamroll Kent State
videos.description: Sooners' Michael Hawkins Jr. did not disappoint posting three passing TDs and one rushing TD while the OU defense allows only 135 yards in a 44-0 shutout of the Golden Flashes.
